name: luoyuctl/agenttrace
summary: Local-first session audit tool for Codex and other coding agents, turning run logs into operational evidence for post-run review, baseline comparison, and CI gates across spend, token use, timing, health, and tool failures.
evidence: Ships a Codex plugin manifest and `agenttrace-session-audit` skill so Codex can invoke the local session audit workflow directly.
Parses Codex CLI session logs, including `.codex/sessions`, archived sessions, and Codex rollout JSONL, with dedicated parser fixtures and tests.

Turns local agent run logs into repeatable JSON, Markdown, and HTML evidence with health thresholds, critical-session failures, tool-failure-rate gates, and baseline regression comparisons for CI or review handoff.
